visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman wearing a white sleeveless dress and a black beret stands in front of a tall warehouse shelf. She gestures energetically towards a large, bull-shaped inflatable pool float mounted on the wall behind her. Bright warehouse lighting illuminates the scene. Multi-colored text overlays the frame. (2) A second woman in a black cutout top enters the frame from the left. They both gesture towards the bull float and a price tag. (3) A close-up shot of the price tag on the shelf shows "1697311 * INFLATABULL" with a price of "$ 497". (4) A close-up of the bull float reveals its brown color, realistic bull head with horns, and a large black outer ring. (5) Back to a medium shot, the two women hold a box depicting people using the bull float in a pool. The background remains the warehouse environment. (6) The woman in the white dress continues talking directly to the camera, using high-energy hand movements and facial expressions to emphasize her points. Text animations appear and disappear around her as she speaks.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 超殺折扣. [Variety]: 超級搶眼. [Variety]: 折. [Variety]: 折. [Slogan]: 超巨大門牛游泳圈. (2) [Subtitle]: 走走走打到骨折. [Variety]: 打到骨折. (3) [Subtitle]: 這個鬥牛造型的游泳圈. [Variety]: 游泳圈. (4) [Subtitle]: 他從2000元降到497元. [Variety]: $ 497. (5) [Subtitle]: 原價1999 現在特價. (6) [Subtitle]: 不用500塊. [Variety]: 不用500塊. (7) [Subtitle]: 而且超多的 有沒有人喜歡去海邊玩. (8) [Subtitle]: 你拿這個一定超蝦趴. (9) [Subtitle]: 因為他是給大人坐的請看. (10) [Subtitle]: 你可以乘著他飛越太平洋? (11) [Subtitle]: 應該要..會被海關攔截之類的. (12) [Subtitle]: 他裡面有三個氣囊 所以會比較安全. (13) [Subtitle]: 然後他耐重是91公斤 所以比爾. (14) [Subtitle]: 坐不上去!. [Variety]: 坐不上去!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in a white dress, 1 female assistant in a black dress appearing mid-video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character is an Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white textured sleeveless dress and a black beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video is filmed inside a large warehouse-style retail store (Costco), with high metal shelving units stocked with various boxed products and a large pool float mounted as a display.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy upbeat synth-pop background music begins with a clear, rhythmic beat. A cheerful female voice narrates with high pitch variability and a fast speech rate, sounding very excited. No significant ambient noise is heard. (2) A sharp "click" digital sound effect triggers a transition. The vocal continues enthusiastically, detailing product prices with high intensity. BGM remains constant in the background. (3) A "whoosh" transition sound occurs. The speaker's tone remains friendly and comedic, with clear articulation while joking about product features. The BGM beat remains steady and driving. (4) A cartoonish sparkle or bell sound effect accompanies the final punchline. The speaker delivers a joke about weight limits with high vocal arousal. The music fades out as the video ends.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Feature Highlight -> Price Comparison -> Practical Context -> Humorous Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and promote a significantly discounted bull-shaped inflatable pool float found at Costco, utilizing high-energy narration and visual evidence to encourage viewers to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Directly identifying the store (Costco), showing the specific product, and emphasizing the massive price reduction from 2000 to 497.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly energetic social media shopping vlog with dense text overlays and fast-paced editing designed for engagement and promotion.
